heading_content_part: Privacy PolicySearch this siteSkip to main contentSkip to navigationPrivacy PolicyPrivacy PolicyBlack Zoro Games and References team has adopted this privacy policy (“Privacy Policy”) to explain how Black Zoro Games and References collects, stores, and uses the information collected in connection with Black Zoro Games and References’s Services.

BY INSTALLING, USING, REGISTERING TO OR OTHERWISE ACCESSING THE SERVICES, YOU AGREE TO THIS PRIVACY POLICY AND GIVE AN EXPLICIT AND INFORMED CONSENT TO THE PROCESSING OF YOUR PERSONAL DATA IN ACCORDANCE WITH THIS PRIVACY POLICY. IF YOU DO NOT AGREE TO THIS PRIVACY POLICY, PLEASE DO NOT INSTALL, USE, REGISTER TO OR OTHERWISE ACCESS THE SERVICES. Black Zoro Games and References reserves the right to modify this Privacy Policy at reasonable times, so please review it frequently. If Black Zoro Games and References makes material or significant changes to this Privacy Policy, Black Zoro Games and References may post a notice on Black Zoro Games and References’s website along with the updated Privacy Policy. Your continued use of Services will signify your acceptance of the changes to this Privacy Policy.
Non-personal dataFor purposes of this Privacy Policy, “non-personal data” means information that does not directly identify you. The
types of non-

personal data Black Zoro Games and References may collect and use include, but are not limited to: application properties, including, but not limited to application name, package name and icon installed on your device. Your checkin (include like, recommendation) of a game will be disclosed to all Black Zoro Games and References users.

Black Zoro Games and References may use and disclose to Black Zoro Games and References’s partners and contractors the collected non-personal data for purposes of analyzing usage of the Services, advertisement serving, managing and providing the Services and to further develop the Services and other Black Zoro Games and References services and products.You recognize and agree that the analytics companies utilized by Black Zoro Games and References may combine the

information collected with other information they have independently collected from other services or products relating to your activities. These companies collect and use information under their own privacy policies.Personal DataFor purposes of this Privacy Policy, “personal data” means personally identifiable information that specifically identifies you as an individual.

Personal information collected by Black Zoro Games and References is information voluntarily provided to us by you when you create your account or change your accountinformation. The information includes your facebook id, name, gender, location and your friends’id on facebook. Black Zoro Games and References also stores your game checkins, likes, dislikes, recommendations and messages.

Black Zoro Games and References may use collected personal data for purposes of analyzing usage of the Services, providing customer and technical support, managing and providing Services (including managing advertisement serving) and to further develop the Services and other Black Zoro Games and References services and products. Black Zoro Games and References may combine non-personal data with personal data.

Please note that certain features of the Services may be able to connect to your social networking sites to obtain additional information about you. In such cases, Black Zoro Games and References may be able to collect certain information from your social networking profile when your social networking site permits it, and when you consent to allow your social networking site to make that information available to Black Zoro Games and References. This information may include, but is not limited to, your name, profile picture, gender, user ID, email address, your country, your language, your time zone, the organizations and links on your profile page, the names and profile pictures of your social networking site “friends” and other information you have included in your social networking site profile. Black Zoro Games and References may associate and/or combine as well as use information collected by Black Zoro Games and References and/or obtained through such social networking sites in accordance with this Privacy Policy.

Disclosure and Transfer of Personal DataBlack Zoro Games and References collects and processes personal data on a voluntary basis and it is not in the business of selling your personal data to third parties. Personal data may, however, occasionally be disclosed in accordance with applicable legislation and this Privacy Policy. Additionally, Black Zoro Games and References may disclose personal data to its parent companies and its subsidiaries in accordance with this Privacy Policy.

Black Zoro Games and References may hire agents and contractors to collect and process personal data on Black Zoro Games and References’s behalf and in such cases such agents and contractors will be instructed to comply with our Privacy Policy and to use personal data only for the purposes for which the third party has been engaged by Black Zoro Games and References. These agents and contractors may not use your personal data for their own marketing purposes. Black Zoro Games and References may use third party service providers such as credit card processors, e-mail service providers, shipping agents, data analyzers and business intelligence providers. Black Zoro Games and References has the right to share your personal data as necessary for the aforementioned third parties to provide their services for Black Zoro Games and References. Black Zoro Games and References is not liable for the acts and omissions of these third parties, except as provided by mandatory law.

Black Zoro Games and References may disclose your personal data to third parties as required by law enforcement or other government officials in connection with an investigation of fraud, intellectual property infringements, or other activity that is illegal or may expose you or Black Zoro Games and References to legal liability. Black Zoro Games and References may also disclose your personal data to third parties when Black Zoro Games and References has a reason to believe that a disclosure is necessary to address potential or actual injury or interference with Black Zoro Games and References’s rights, property, operations, users or others who may be harmed or may suffer loss or damage, or Black Zoro Games and References believes that such disclosure is necessary to protect Black Zoro Games and References’s rights, combat fraud and/or comply with a judicial proceeding, court order, or legal process served on Black Zoro Games and References. To the extent permitted by applicable law, Black Zoro Games and References will make reasonable efforts to notify you of such disclosure through Black Zoro Games and References’s website or in another reasonable manner.
Safeguards

Black Zoro Games and References follows generally accepted industry standards and maintains reasonable safeguards to attempt to ensure the security, integrity and privacy of the information in Black Zoro Games and References’s possession. Only those persons with a need to process your personal data in connection with the fulfillment of their tasks in accordance with the purposes of this Privacy Policy and for the purposes of performing technical maintenance, have access to your personal data in Black Zoro Games and References’s possession. Personal data collected by Black Zoro Games and References is stored in secure operating environments that are not available to the public. To prevent unauthorized on-line access to personal data, Black Zoro Games and References maintains personal data behind a firewall-protected server. However, no system can be 100% secure and there is the possibility that despite Black Zoro Games and References’s reasonable efforts, there could be unauthorized access to your personal data. By using the Services, you assume this risk.
Other

Please be aware of the open nature of certain social networking and other open features of the Services Black Zoro Games and References may make available to you. You may choose to disclose data about yourself in the course of contributing user generated content to the Services. Any data that you disclose in any of these forums, blogs, chats or the like is public information, and there is no expectation of privacy or confidentiality. Black Zoro Games and References is not responsible for any personal data you choose to make public in any of these forums.

If you are under 15 years of age or a minor in your country of residence, please ask your legal guardian’s permission to use or access the Services. Black Zoro Games and References takes children’s privacy seriously, and encourages parents and/or guardians to play an active role in their children's online experience at all times. Black Zoro Games and References does not knowingly collect any personal information from children below the aforementioned age and if Black Zoro Games and References learns that Black Zoro Games and References has inadvertently gathered personal data from children under the aforementioned age, Black Zoro Games and References will take reasonable measures to promptly erase such personal data from Black Zoro Games and References’s records.

Black Zoro Games and References may store and/or transfer your personal data to its affiliates and partners in and outside of EU/EEA member states and the United States in accordance with mandatory legislation and this Privacy Policy. Black Zoro Games and References may disclose your personal data to third parties in connection with a corporate merger, consolidation, restructuring, the sale of substantially all of Black Zoro Games and References’s stock and/or assets or other corporate change, including, without limitation, during the course of any due diligence process provided, however, that this Privacy Policy shall continue to govern such personal data.

Black Zoro Games and References regularly reviews its compliance with this Privacy Policy. If Black Zoro Games and References receives a formal written complaint from you, it is Black Zoro Games and References’s policy to attempt to contact you directly to address any of your concerns. Black Zoro Games and References will cooperate with the appropriate governmental authorities, including data protection authorities, to resolve any complaints regarding the collection, use, transfer or disclos
